requests.prompt: Beautiful golden Togthr robot character, pixel art style, 16-bit color palette, sharp edges, no anti-aliasing, limited color palette. Chibi style with exaggerated big head and small body, golden glow halo radiating from the character, soft warm golden sparkles floating in the air, dreamy purple-rose gradient background, soft bokeh lights, character holding a small heart with both hands gently, eyes closed peaceful smile, floating mid-air, isolated single character, perfect for app hero/landing page illustration, kawaii with cinematic quality. Negative prompt: 3d render, realistic, blurry, extra limbs, asymmetrical eyes, complex background with multiple subjects, perspective distortion, dynamic pose, motion blur, photorealistic, anime, two characters
